error_signature: Error loading package "n8n-nodes-deepseek" :Package could not be installed
title: Unable to install community nodes in n8n
symptom: Users encounter an error when trying to install any community node, specifically 'Package could not be installed'. This prevents the addition of new functionality to n8n workflows.
applies_when: Running n8n via Docker on Truenas Scale
not_this_if: Installation is done with correct UID/GID settings
No error occurs during package installation
root_cause: The issue arises when the UID and GID for the n8n installation are not set correctly. If these values are not set to 1000 during installation, permission issues can prevent community nodes from being installed properly.
fix_steps: Perform a fresh installation of n8n from the apps library
Set both UID and GID to 1000 during the installation process
Complete the installation and try installing the community nodes again
agent_instruction: Reinstall n8n with UID and GID set to 1000 to resolve the installation issue.
